name: Is it safe to use AI like Claude for legal strategy on my personal injury claim?
description: No—AI chats are discoverable and lack privilege; use only under attorney direction.[1]

mainEntity.name: Is it safe to use AI like Claude for legal strategy on my personal injury claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: No—AI chats are discoverable and lack privilege; use only under attorney direction.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: No, using AI for legal strategy independently creates discoverable evidence that can harm your case.[1] Courts ruled AI conversations lack privilege since AI isn't a lawyer and data may be visible to providers.[1][2] Key factors: inconsistencies between AI prompts and testimony; speculation on fault/damages used against you; only safe if attorney-directed.[1] Stop using AI alone; share past chats with your lawyer for strategy; focus on documented facts only.[1] Attorney guidance protects your position.
